hero.title: Artificial Intelligence Systems
hero.description: This module explores structured AI integration, streaming pipelines, memory systems and retrieval-based architectures. Intelligence is treated as a system layer, not a feature.

modules.title: Streaming Engine
modules.description: Token-level streaming pipeline with incremental rendering and context injection.

modules.title: Context Memory System
modules.description: Short-term and long-term memory handling using structured context storage.

modules.title: RAG Prototype
modules.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation system with vector similarity search.

modules.title: Embedding Visualizer
modules.description: Interactive vector space visualization for semantic comparison.
